      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism that return ModelObjectEvent.Type 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ModelObjectEvent.Type ModelObjectEvent.getType()
      Replies the type of the event.
      static ModelObjectEvent.Type ModelObjectEvent.Type.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static ModelObjectEvent.Type[] ModelObjectEvent.Type.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
